title: Blueprint Desk
concept: A Blueprint-first, tabbed documentation workspace where the catalog, URL runner, current blueprint editor, route-specific launch forms, saved-state proof, and Site Manager tools are organized around preparing reproducible demos.
focus: Blueprint catalog as the first usable viewport
dense category filters and selected Blueprint detail
route-specific launch inputs instead of interchangeable start cards
visible save destination, progress, and saved management proof
high-contrast black, white, cyan technical palette for documentation writers
flows: Browse, search, filter, select, inspect, copy, download, and run Blueprint gallery entries and Blueprint URLs.
Start Playgrounds from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with real input constraints visible.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress and resulting saved state.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, export to GitHub, download .zip, and import-over-current-site consequences.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, current Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, path navigation, and refresh.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
